tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and cluster lookup
helpful: The snapshot exposed fee class, distribution posture, and docket timing.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, relist, and CVSG calibration.
CourtListener MCP identified prior circuit treatment of the petition's section 922(g)(8) theories.
gaps: The fetched brief in opposition had no extractable text layer.
The corpus query surface could not select analogous state-court protection-order cert petitions by subject or originating court.
The salience-band table described by the prediction prompt was not present in the committed statpack.
The default uv cache was read-only and required a writable temporary cache for CLI commands.
notes: The generic corpus query required substantial ranged reads yet produced no close analogue; the statpack and provisioned record carried most of the useful signal.
